scripts.build: bun run --filter @speedreader/core build && bun run --filter speedreader build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next',{recursive:true,force:true}); require('fs').cpSync('apps/web/.next','.next',{recursive:true})"
scripts.build:web: bun run --filter @speedreader/core build && bun run --filter speedreader build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next',{recursive:true,force:true}); require('fs').cpSync('apps/web/.next','.next',{recursive:true})"
